title: Force Fit
text: Force Fit Force list items to be no higher than one character cell. By default, the height of list items is adjusted to accommodate the selected font. Value Description False (default) The height of list items is adjusted to accommodate the selected font. True Each item in the list is displayed no higher than a one-character cell. Description This property cannot be set in ProcScript. Applies To ucombobox (Combo Box) udropdownlist (DropDownList) ulistbox (ListBox ) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
